signals.npcLine: Crypto streets bleeding; market pulse sinks deeper.
signals.questPulse: Scan for safe havens amid falling credits.
signals.worldFeed: Global tokens flicker under shadow; fear grips nodes.
signals.clueEvent: Market-wide cryptoshock triggers spree of digital hacks.

signals.npcLine: Unit RAVE signals glitch; stability questionable.
signals.questPulse: Investigate anomaly around RAVE data streams.
signals.worldFeed: Obscure tokens spark whispers; strange volume shifts.
signals.clueEvent: Unknown transfer spikes within micro-ledger clusters.

signals.npcLine: WOJAK shadow grafts gain traction in neon trade.
signals.questPulse: Trace stealth chatter on Wojak node upticks.
signals.worldFeed: Whispers: Wojak codes cracking under digital pressure.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted leaks hint at upcoming market bubble burst.

signals.npcLine: ASTEROID chain jitters; mining ops report signal loss.
signals.questPulse: Recover lost data from defunct asteroid rigs.
signals.worldFeed: Economic tremors shake off-world resource grids.
signals.clueEvent: Disruption hints at sabotage, mining yields unstable.

signals.npcLine: PIEVERSE net crawlers detect swarm of unknown bots.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate pieverse layers before bots corrupt feeds.
signals.worldFeed: Bot plague spreads, eroding confidence in net assets.
signals.clueEvent: Automated attacks destabilize token-based social hubs.
